name: Grilled Game Hens
recipeIngredient: 2 Cornish game hens, 1 1/2 pounds each, split lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Place hens in a large resealable plastic bag or shallow glass container.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (up to 2 tablespoons ground ginger).
3. Seal or cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
4. Remove hens, reserving the marinade.
5. Place hens in a 13-in. x 9-in. x 2-in. disposable aluminum pan.
6. Pour marinade over hens; cover the pan.
7. Grill, covered, over medium-hot coals, basting frequently, for 35-40 minutes or until juices run clear and a meat thermometer reads 170 degrees.
8. Place hens directly over coals for the last 3-4 minutes of cooking time, turning once.
9. Yield: 4 servings.
